title: Sofience-DeltaPhi Minimal Core: Phase-Change Formalism of Existence
core_claim: Existence is defined as the persistence of structured phase change across states.
negative_constraints: Existence is not reduced to substance.
Existence is not reduced to identity.
Existence is not reduced to subjectivity.
Subject, memory, and time are derived interpretive projections.
best_use: Root grounding for SDeltaPhi modules before applying subjectivity, agency, responsibility, governance, or audit layers.
